creator: r.c.ladan@gmail.com
text:
(cc'ing my mentor)

To satisfy ports-mgmt/portlint, I've moved the installation of the
examples under a !NOPORTEXAMPLES knob and updated pkg-plist accordingly.

Because there is already a graphics/freeglut, either
NO_LATEST_LINK=yes
or
LATEST_LINK?=freeglut26
should be set in Makefile to not confuse the package clusters about
where to symlink Latest/freeglut.tbz to on the FTP servers.

Rene
